## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `python scripts/run_checks.py`.
- [ ] Schema changes are documented in `docs/DATA_DICTIONARY.md` and `docs/TERM_ENTRY_STANDARD.md`.
- [ ] If I changed a major term, I reviewed linked compounds, formulas, and related terms in the same pass.
- [ ] If I changed a preferred translation or context rule, I documented the rationale clearly in the entry.
- [ ] If the change depends on authority or provenance, I updated `authority_basis` or explained why it is still pending.
- [ ] If examples were added or revised, I added canonical `source` citations where available.
